repos.name: digital-patient
repos.role: Primary patient digital twin backbone for graph-based disease-state tracking and endpoint-aware state representation.
repos.note: The website now uses this repo as the reference backbone for the twin-state architecture layer and update contract.

repos.name: TwinWeaver
repos.role: Longitudinal patient-trajectory and clinical-sequence framing for future time-updating twin narratives.
repos.note: The website now treats TwinWeaver as the design reference for future longitudinal update mode and narrative state stitching.

repos.name: DRKG
repos.role: Knowledge graph evidence layer connecting drugs, genes, diseases, and biological processes for mechanism-aware repurposing review.
repos.note: The website now surfaces a DRKG-style case panel so knowledge-graph context is visible next to TWAS and candidate ranking.

sepsis.title: DRKG-style sepsis graph panel
sepsis.summary: A compact knowledge-graph view showing how host-response genes, vascular injury biology, and candidate drugs intersect in the current case framing.

triples.head: Sepsis
triples.rationale: Knowledge-graph style edge for shock physiology and vascular leak.

triples.head: STAT1
triples.rationale: Links imported TWAS signal to a pathway-level mechanism node.

triples.head: Baricitinib
triples.rationale: Connects candidate ranking to graph-level mechanism overlap.

triples.head: ANGPT2
triples.rationale: Supports endothelial stress interpretation in severe sepsis.

candidemia.title: DRKG-style candidemia graph panel
candidemia.summary: A compact graph evidence view linking fungal host-defense genes, endothelial stress, and exploratory adjunctive candidates.

triples.head: Candidemia
triples.rationale: Frames candidemia as a host-response and source-control state rather than only a culture result.

triples.head: CXCL8
triples.rationale: Connects imported expression evidence to fungal defense biology.

triples.head: VCAM1
triples.rationale: Links inflammatory adhesion biology to bloodstream fungal infection context.

triples.head: Losartan
triples.rationale: Knowledge-graph style explanation for exploratory host-directed review.
